commands:
iw dev wl0 link
wpa_cli -p /var/run/wpa_supplicant -i wl0 status
STA_MAC=$(wl -i wl0 assoclist | awk 'NR==1{print $2}'); [ -n "$STA_MAC" ] && wl -i wl0 sta_info $STA_MAC | sed -n 's/.*smoothed rssi: *\(-*[0-9][0-9]*\).*/DriverSmoothedRSSI5g=\1/p'

iw dev wl1 link
wpa_cli -p /var/run/wpa_supplicant -i wl1 status
wl -i wl1 status
STA_MAC=$(wl -i wl1 assoclist | awk 'NR==1{print $2}'); [ -n "$STA_MAC" ] && wl -i wl1 sta_info $STA_MAC | sed -n 's/.*smoothed rssi: *\(-*[0-9][0-9]*\).*/DriverSmoothedRSSI6g=\1/p'

iw dev wl2 link
wpa_cli -p /var/run/wpa_supplicant -i wl2 status
STA_MAC=$(wl -i wl2 assoclist | awk 'NR==1{print $2}'); [ -n "$STA_MAC" ] && wl -i wl2 sta_info $STA_MAC | sed -n 's/.*smoothed rssi: *\(-*[0-9][0-9]*\).*/DriverSmoothedRSSI24g=\1/p'
